idea-plugin.name: SQLTest
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for sqllogictest (.test) files, the text-driven testing framework used by DuckDB and other SQL databases.
  • Syntax highlighting for SQL keywords, directives, comments, strings, and numbers
  • Proper result section handling (no highlighting bleed from query results)
  • Code folding for statement/query blocks, loops, and result sections
  • Structure view — navigate between tests, loops, requires in the sidebar
  • Gutter icons — green check (statement ok), red X (statement error), play (query)
  • Brace matching for loop/endloop and foreach/endforeach
  • Error annotations — mismatched loops, missing results, bad qualifiers
  • Test counter in status bar (🦆 X stmt, Y query)
  • Supports .test, .test_slow, .testslow, .benchmark, and .slt files
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.0
  • Structure view: navigate statements, queries, loops, requires from sidebar
  • Code folding for statement/query blocks, loops, and foreach blocks
  • Gutter icons: green check (ok), red X (error), play button (query)
  • Brace matching for loop/endloop and foreach/endforeach pairs
  • Error annotations: mismatched loop/endloop, missing ----, bad statement qualifiers
  • Status bar widget: shows test count for open file
  • Context-aware highlighting: directives, SQL keywords, dimmed result output
  • New directives: require, require-env, mode, halt, skipif, onlyif, foreach, etc.
1.1.2
  • Fix: apostrophe in query results no longer breaks syntax highlighting (#10)
  • Added RESULT_SECTION lexer state for proper result section handling
  • Expanded SQL keyword list with modern DuckDB keywords
  • GitHub Actions CI
